summary: First testing iteration: Comprehensive backend + frontend e2e testing of Tesla Mining Investments multi-page React Router app with FastAPI backend. All 10 backend pytest tests passed (health, plans, stats, testimonials, faqs, steps, visits POST + summary aggregation, cta POST, plus 422 validation cases). All frontend flows passed end-to-end: Home -> HowItWorks -> Plans -> Testimonials -> FAQ -> GetStarted via Next buttons (with /api/visits POST), nav links use React Router (no full reload), mobile hamburger toggle works, 404 page renders for unknown routes, Telegram CTA on /get-started opens new tab to https://t.me/TMBsupport_X, footer telegram link href correct with target=_blank.
critical_code_review_comments: lib/api.ts: BASE falls back to '' when REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL not set; would silently call same-origin /api -- acceptable here because vite.config envPrefix includes 'REACT_APP_' so it works, but consider failing fast if missing.
server.py uses @app.on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in FastAPI; consider migrating to lifespan context manager (non-blocking).
PLANS/STATS/etc. are inline static lists; OK for MVP, but if these are intended to be DB-backed in production, plan a seed script.
/api/visits endpoint has no input length validation on `page` field (could be abused with arbitrary strings). Low priority for MVP.
seed_data_creation: Test posts /api/visits with page='home' and /api/cta with action='telegram-redirect' during run; small analytics rows written to local Mongo (no cleanup needed, append-only).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py — reusable. Frontend Vite config (vite.config.ts) sets envPrefix=['VITE_','REACT_APP_'] so REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL works at build/runtime via import.meta.env. All data-testid selectors in problem statement exist and behave correctly. Telegram URL and target=_blank verified on both /get-started CTA and footer link.
